name: EntityRecognizerAnnotations
description: Describes the annotations associated with a entity recognizer.

allOf.description: Specifies the Amazon S3 location where the annotations for an entity recognizer are located. The URI must be in the same Region as the API endpoint that you are calling.
Specifies the Amazon S3 location where the test annotations for an entity recognizer are located. The URI must be in the same Region as the API endpoint that you are calling.
